elements.text:
You have a midterm next week that's going to count for a lot of your grade. You haven't understood this unit's course material that well and you wonder how the test is going to go.

Here are some thoughts that might pop into mind:

texts: My professor will think I'm dumb if I do not do well.
I don't understand the material enough to ace this test, but I think I know enough to pass.
I probably won't do very well in this course, but it's only one class, and my GPA will be okay.
I can ask for help to study for this test.
